identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a career guidance system that feels like a futuristic launchpad, not a government form.
principles: Contrast: Deep Void Black vs. Electric Lime

headings.usage: All section headers, hero titles, and key metrics.

mono.usage: Data tags, code snippets, AI reasoning output.

landing_page.description: Asymmetrical layout. Hero section spans full width but uses negative space. Feature cards are unevenly sized.

dashboard.description: Dense, data-heavy grid. 4 columns. Widgets stretch to fill height.

test_pages.description: Single column, centered, max-width-2xl. Distraction-free. Progress bar fixed at top.

buttons.primary: bg-lime-400 text-lime-950 hover:bg-lime-500 rounded-full font-bold px-8 py-6 transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white hover:bg-zinc-700 rounded-full px-6 py-6 border border-zinc-700

cards.glass: bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl

inputs.style: bg-zinc-950/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-lime-400/50 focus:ring-lime-400/20 rounded-lg h-12

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle noise texture overlay on the main background (opacity 0.03).
visual_enhancers.borders: The 'Tracing Beam' effect on active cards (animated gradient border).
visual_enhancers.shadows: Glow effects instead of drop shadows. e.g., shadow-[0_0_30px_-10px_rgba(190,242,100,0.3)]

motion.hover_effects: Scale up 1.02 on cards. Text color shift on links.
motion.loading: Animated 'decoding' text effect for AI predictions.

hero_student.description: Student with headphones in neon lighting, representing the 'Tech/Future' persona.
hero_student.usage: Hero section, right side or background blend.

ai_background.usage: Background overlay for the 'Results' or 'AI Processing' screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add 'Space Grotesk' and 'Outfit' from Google Fonts immediately.
2. DARK MODE DEFAULT: Force dark mode in tailwind config or html class. The app should rarely be white.
3. USE SHADCN SMARTLY: Don't use default Shadcn styles. Override borders with white/10 and backgrounds with zinc-900/50.
4. AI INTEGRATION: When displaying GPT-5.1 results, use a 'Streaming Text' effect to make it feel like the AI is thinking live.
5. NO BORING FORMS: Break the 'Student Info' form into a multi-step wizard with large, clickable options instead of just text inputs.
6. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute (e.g., 'submit-score-btn', 'aptitude-option-a').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid 'AI Slop' aesthetics (generic centered layouts, gradients everywhere).
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
